channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.description: The Tanzanian government has initiated a major modernization program for the National Museum, integrating digital technology, upgrading infrastructure, and reforming outdated legislation to position t...

item.title: Celebrity Confesses Pregnancy via Playful Social Media Post
item.description: King Kalala, a popular Kenyan influencer known for her blunt relationship advice and tough-girl persona, surprised followers by announcing her pregnancy through a lighthearted Instagram video. The pos...

item.title: Kutlwano Monyai's Exhibition Celebrates Family Legacy Through Crocheting Art
item.description: Award-winning artist Kutlwano Monyai unveils her solo exhibition 'Dakalo: The Ultimate Gift', celebrating the cultural significance of crocheting through her family's legacy. The exhibition, held at G...

item.title: Jon Stewart Criticizes Trump's Overbearing Presence at World Cup Celebration
item.description: Comedian Jon Stewart mocked President Donald Trump for his intrusive behavior during Spain's World Cup victory celebration. During a segment on his 'Daily Show,' Stewart criticized Trump for staying o...

item.title: Lucy Hale mourns sudden passing of father Preston Hale
item.description: Lucy Hale, 37, has shared an emotional tribute to her late father, Preston Hale, on Instagram following his unexpected death. The Pretty Little Liars star revealed her father passed away suddenly last...

item.title: Eight workers killed in Sikkim tunnel collapse following landslide and suspected gas leak
item.description: A tragic incident occurred in Namchi district of Sikkim on Monday when a landslide triggered the collapse of an under-construction tunnel, resulting in eight worker fatalities. The National Hydroelect...

item.title: Tanzania's Central Bank Projects Interest Rate Stability Through 2026
item.description: The Bank of Tanzania (BoT) is projected to maintain its policy rate at 6.25% until the end of 2026 before declining to 5.75% in 2027, according to recent macroeconomic forecasts. Inflation is expected...

item.title: Three Excise Officials Abducted in Balochistan Attack: Police Report
item.description: Three excise officials were abducted at gunpoint following a coordinated attack on a checkpost along the Dalbandin-Taftan Highway in Balochistan's Chagai district. According to police sources, around ...

item.title: Sokoto Rainstorm Causes Widespread Damage, Displaces Hundreds
item.description: A severe windstorm and heavy rainfall hit Sokoto State's Kware Local Government Area, resulting in four confirmed deaths, multiple injuries, and widespread damage. The storm destroyed homes, schools, ...

item.description: Suzanna Owiyo, a celebrated Kenyan musician, has opened up about her emotional journey following the burial of her brother, George Owiyo. In a heartfelt message posted on Facebook, she expressed deep ...

item.title: Marcos appoints Joey Salceda as head of Presidential Legislative Liaison Office

item.title: Delhi Police register 4 cases over CJP protest violence, probe ongoing
item.description: Delhi Police have registered four cases, including one related to a criminal conspiracy, following violent incidents during the Cockroach Janta Party (CJP) march to Parliament. The cases involve unaut...

item.description: The article reflects on the FIFA World Cup, highlighting both its successes and shortcomings. While acknowledging the event as a significant sporting occasion, it critiques the decision to host it in ...

item.title: Federal court halts Paramount-Warner Bros merger as 12 states challenge anti-competitive merger
item.description: A US federal court has temporarily blocked the proposed merger between Paramount and Warner Bros, granting a two-week stay after 12 states, led by California, filed a lawsuit arguing the deal would re...

item.title: Canada Considers Increasing Oil Exports to U.S. in Preliminary Trade Agreement
item.description: Prime Minister Mark Carney proposed increasing Canadian oil exports to the U.S. by three to four million barrels annually during fall 2025 trade talks, according to U.S. Ambassador Pete Hoekstra. The ...

item.title: Audi ZERØ Concept Car Redefines Automotive Design with Minimalist Geometry
item.description: The Audi ZERØ, a speculative electric vehicle concept by designer Wini Camacho, challenges traditional automotive design through its radical use of geometric forms. This two-seater car features a sing...

item.title: Hezbollah's uncertain future as Lebanese support dwindles
item.description: Hezbollah faces a pivotal decision as its influence in Lebanon declines, with potential paths including political transformation, rebranding its military wing, or gradual marginalisation. The group's ...

item.title: Anthropic Settles $1.5B Copyright Lawsuit Over AI Training Practices
item.description: A federal judge has finalized the approval of Anthropic’s $1.5 billion copyright settlement with authors and publishers who sued the AI company over its use of copyrighted books to train its models. T...

item.title: Open Letter to the Philippine Senate on the Need for Leadership and Reform
item.description: Mon Abrea, a tax expert and advisor, writes an open letter to the Philippine Senate criticizing its focus on political drama and division instead of addressing national issues. He highlights the burde...

item.title: A mother's relentless pursuit of justice in a Mexican criminal case
item.description: The article details the extraordinary journey of a Mexican mother, Mrs Wallace, who took it upon herself to investigate the disappearance of her son. After authorities failed to provide answers, she b...
